subject: rename methods and add types
body: Replace raw SQL queries with typed ORM calls. Rename fetchUser/fetchAllUsers to findUserById/listUsers for clarity. Add Database type, ListOptions interface, and explicit return types across service, routes, and types.

reasoning.type_classification: Code restructuring: variable renames, method renames, type additions. No new user-facing functionality, no bug fix. 'refactor' is correct.
reasoning.scope_selection: Changes span user-service.ts, user-routes.ts, and user.ts — all related to the 'users' domain. Using 'users' as scope.
reasoning.multi_file_note: 3 files changed but all within the same domain boundary, so a single commit is appropriate.
